Represents a patient involved in a medical accident displayed when clicking on an accident node.

Creates a patient with default medical values.

Stores how many agents are displayed at the same visual position
PRIORITY - Enum constant in enum class model.AgentType
High-priority agent whose speed scales with its priority level.
PriorityAgent - Class in model
High-priority agent whose movement speed scales with its priority level.
PriorityAgent(int, Node, Node, int) - Constructor for class model.PriorityAgent
Creates a priority agent with the given priority level.
priorityAgents - Variable in class model.Node
List of priority agents currently located on this node
priorityLevel - Variable in class model.PriorityAgent
Priority level of this agent (>= 1).

Progress on the current edge (distance already traveled)
